creator: Jaap.Boender@pps.jussieu.fr
text:
This is an update of ocaml-cryptokit to its newest version, 1.5. Changes from 1.3 include:
- support for oasis and findlib
- added blowfish and MAC support
- bugfixes

I've also changed my (i.e. the maintainer's) e-mail address.

Fix: patch included. Note: the files directory and pkg-plist are no longer necessary; files/META is now included in the distribution, the patch to the Makefile no longer applies and the plist is generated automatically by findlib.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
